message:
refactor(search,storage,test): search query restructuring, storage refinements, test adjustments

- Restructure search query pipeline with improved progressive phase
  coordination (+125 lines changed)
- Minor storage SQLite refinements
- Bench and test adjustments (integration_regression, bookmarks,
  frankensqlite_concurrent_stress)
